meaning: n.[植]植被,(总称)植物、草木,(植物的)生长、呆板单调的生活
examples: We fought our way through the dense vegetation.
The hills are covered in lush green vegetation.
The inn has a garden of semi-tropical vegetation.
Rising temperatures have also resulted in vegetation sprouting up in unexpected places along the tundra.
Work has now been completed to realign and level a dozen collapsed gravestones and control overgrown vegetation.
